title: Can Unity Unlock Growth Through Its Create Solutions Segment?
text: Create Solutions Revenue Performance: 2024: Create Solutions revenue was $614 million for the full year 2024, down 29% year-over-year. However, Create Solutions revenue was $152 million in Q4 2023, compared to $152 million in Q4 2024, showing stabilization by the end of the year. 2025 Recovery: Throughout 2025, Create Solutions showed recovery. Q1 2025: Create Solutions revenue was $150 million, compared to $164 million in Q1 2024. Q2 2025: Create Solutions revenue was $154 million, compared to $151 million in Q2 2024, up 2% YoY. Q3 2025: Create Solutions revenue was $152 million, compared to $147 million in Q3 2024. Q4 2025: Create Solutions revenue was $165 million, compared to $152 million in Q4 2024. Growth Outlook: Adjusting for nonstrategic revenues, the segment delivered robust 16% year-over-year growth, underscoring the strength of Unity's core subscription business. For Q1 2026, the company expects double-digit year-over-year revenue growth (excluding the impact of non-strategic revenue). The recovery was driven by Unity 6 adoption and improved customer sentiment following the runtime fee cancellation.
